creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 214453
update to OpenImageIO stable release 2.1.15.0

This patch updates graphics/openimageio (oiio henceforth) and py-openimageio to stable release 2.1.15.0. All INDEX-12 listed slave ports continue to build on 12.1-RELEASE amd64 (blender, opencolorio-tools, py-opencolorio, openshadinglanguage) and with py27 and py37.

Add libfmt (was removed from the oiio sources) to LIB_DEPENDS and git to BUILD_DEPENDS to avert configure errors.
